license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rxad7ie
title: Larval Movement
author: Wen Aw

steps_raw.instruction: 48 third instar female larvae from each mitotype were placed in 0.5% agar in petri dishes.
Individual larvae were then placed in quadrants of separate petri dishes.
Larvae were observed for 60 seconds and larvae trails were immediately traced onto the lid of each dish. The distance moved by each larva was measured independently by two investigators
